fields.title: [session-api][worktree] Implement session check-in and worktree assignment surfaces
[session-api][worktree] Implement session check-in and worktree assignment surfaces

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. session-api check-in/resume returns session id, authoritative worktree path, branch, allocation mode, and ticket/owner context. 2. session-api lookup surfaces return the authoritative path for existing sessions. 3. reuse vs rotation follows the planning contract and records predecessor lineage. 4. tests cover new assignment, same-session reuse, handoff rotation, and invalid-worktree recovery. 5. draftboard ownership remains separate from worktree assignment.
